option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <size android:width="10dp" android:height="10dp" /> <solid android:color="#2C3E50" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <size android:width="10dp" android:height="10dp" /> <solid android:color="#BFCBD6" /> </shape>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:navigationIconTint="#2C3E50" app:title="@string/title_camera" app:titleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="#2C3E50" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Header Area --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:letterSpacing="0.05" android:text="Memories" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:textSize="28sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Elegant Capture Experience" android:textColor="#7F8C8D" android:textSize="12sp" android:letterSpacing="0.1" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Khung Camera chính --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/previewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/header">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#DCDFE2" />
<!-- TextView hiển thị Countdown (Mặc định ẩn) --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvCountdown" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:text="3" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="100sp" android:visibility="gone" android:shadowColor="#80000000" android:shadowDx="2" android:shadowDy="2" android:shadowRadius="10"/> </FrameLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Nút chọn tỉ lệ --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/ratioContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnRatioSquare" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/previewCard">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioSquare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="1:1" android:textColor="#2C3E50" app:strokeColor="#BDC3C7" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioWide" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="16:9" android:textColor="#2C3E50" app:strokeColor="#BDC3C7" />
</com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<!-- Nút Chụp ảnh --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCapture" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:letterSpacing="0.15" android:text="START CAPTURING" android:textSize="14sp" app:backgroundTint="#2C3E50" app:cornerRadius="0dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<!-- Overlay kết quả (ẩn mặc định) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Select your best shot" android:textSize="24sp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp"/>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPhotos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNextToEdit" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="Next to Edit" app:backgroundTint="#2C3E50" app:cornerRadius="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/topAppBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:navigationIconTint="#2C3E50" app:title="@string/title_camera" app:titleCentered="true" app:titleTextColor="#2C3E50" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Header Area --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topAppBar">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:letterSpacing="0.05" android:text="Memories" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:textSize="28sp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Elegant Capture Experience" android:textColor="#7F8C8D" android:textSize="12sp" android:letterSpacing="0.1" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Khung Camera chính --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:id="@+id/previewCard" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintDimensionRatio="1:1" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/header">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.camera.view.PreviewView android:id="@+id/viewFinder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#DCDFE2" />
<!-- TextView hiển thị Countdown (Mặc định ẩn) --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvCountdown" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:text="3" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="100sp" android:visibility="gone" android:shadowColor="#80000000" android:shadowDx="2" android:shadowDy="2" android:shadowRadius="10"/>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardLastCapture" android:layout_width="72dp" android:layout_height="72dp" android:layout_gravity="top|end" android:layout_margin="12dp" android:visibility="gone" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:strokeColor="#CCFFFFFF" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivLastCapturePreview" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:scaleType="centerCrop" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<View android:id="@+id/captureFlashOverlay" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:alpha="0" android:background="@android:color/white" android:visibility="gone" /> </FrameLayout> </androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Nút chọn tỉ lệ --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/ratioContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:singleSelection="true" app:checkedButton="@+id/btnRatioSquare" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/previewCard">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioSquare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="1:1" android:textColor="#2C3E50" app:strokeColor="#BDC3C7" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRatioWide" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="16:9" android:textColor="#2C3E50" app:strokeColor="#BDC3C7" />
</com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCaptureStatus" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/capture_status_ready" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ratioContainer" />
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/captureProgress" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="6dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:indicatorColor="#2C3E50" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvCaptureStatus" app:trackColor="#D5DEE6" app:trackCornerRadius="3dp" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/dotContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/captureProgress" />
<!-- Nút Chụp ảnh --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCapture" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_marginHorizontal="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="40dp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:letterSpacing="0.15" android:text="START CAPTURING" android:textSize="14sp" app:backgroundTint="#2C3E50" app:cornerRadius="0dp" app:elevation="4dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/dotContainer" />
<!-- Overlay kết quả (ẩn mặc định) --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F4F7F9" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:visibility="gone" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Select your best shot" android:textSize="24sp" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-medium" android:textColor="#2C3E50" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp"/>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvPhotos" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnNextToEdit" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="Next to Edit" app:backgroundTint="#2C3E50" app:cornerRadius="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">ExpressionPhotoBooth</string> <string name="author">Trọng Đức</string> <string name="capture_photo">Capture</string> <string name="ratio_square">1:1</string> <string name="ratio_wide">16:9</string> <string name="camera_not_ready">Camera is not ready yet</string> <string name="failed_create_folder">Cannot create photo folder</string> <string name="capture_failed">Capture failed</string> <string name="camera_permission_granted">Camera permission granted</string> <string name="camera_permission_denied">Camera permission denied</string> <string name="photo_saved_path">Saved: %1$s</string> <string name="no_photo_to_continue">No photos captured</string> <string name="no_photo_to_edit">No photo selected for editing</string> <string name="failed_open_photo">Cannot open selected photo</string> <string name="failed_save_temp_result">Cannot create edited preview</string> <string name="no_result_to_show">No result image to display</string> <string name="no_result_to_save">No result image to save</string> <string name="failed_save_result">Failed to save image</string> <string name="saved_to_gallery">Saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="no_images_for_video">No captured images to create video</string> <string name="exporting_video">Exporting timelapse video...</string> <string name="failed_save_video">Failed to export video</string> <string name="video_saved_to_gallery">Video saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="title_setup">CHOOSE YOUR FRAME</string> <string name="title_camera">Camera</string> <string name="title_selection">Choose Best Shot</string> <string name="title_edit">Edit Photo</string> <string name="title_result">Result</string> <string name="btn_edit">EDIT</string> <string name="btn_edit_with_count">EDIT (%1$d)</string> <string name="btn_result">RESULT</string> <string name="select_one_photo_for_edit">Vui long chon 1 anh de chinh sua</string> <string name="batch_edit_start">Dang chinh sua %1$d anh da chon</string> <string name="batch_edit_completed">Da hoan thanh chinh sua anh da chon</string> <string name="selected_strip_title">Selected photos</string> <string name="clear_selection">Clear</string> <string name="selection_status_initial">Selected: 0/0</string> <string name="selection_status_none">Selected: 0/%1$d</string> <string name="selection_status_selected">Selected: %1$d/%2$d</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">ExpressionPhotoBooth</string> <string name="author">Trọng Đức</string> <string name="capture_photo">Capture</string> <string name="ratio_square">1:1</string> <string name="ratio_wide">16:9</string> <string name="camera_not_ready">Camera is not ready yet</string> <string name="failed_create_folder">Cannot create photo folder</string> <string name="capture_failed">Capture failed</string> <string name="camera_permission_granted">Camera permission granted</string> <string name="camera_permission_denied">Camera permission denied</string> <string name="photo_saved_path">Saved: %1$s</string> <string name="no_photo_to_continue">No photos captured</string> <string name="no_photo_to_edit">No photo selected for editing</string> <string name="failed_open_photo">Cannot open selected photo</string> <string name="failed_save_temp_result">Cannot create edited preview</string> <string name="no_result_to_show">No result image to display</string> <string name="no_result_to_save">No result image to save</string> <string name="failed_save_result">Failed to save image</string> <string name="saved_to_gallery">Saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="no_images_for_video">No captured images to create video</string> <string name="exporting_video">Exporting timelapse video...</string> <string name="failed_save_video">Failed to export video</string> <string name="video_saved_to_gallery">Video saved to gallery: %1$s</string> <string name="back">Back</string> <string name="title_setup">CHOOSE YOUR FRAME</string> <string name="title_camera">Camera</string> <string name="title_selection">Choose Best Shot</string> <string name="title_edit">Edit Photo</string> <string name="title_result">Result</string> <string name="btn_edit">EDIT</string> <string name="btn_edit_with_count">EDIT (%1$d)</string> <string name="btn_result">RESULT</string> <string name="btn_result_with_count">RESULT (%1$d/%2$d)</string> <string name="select_enough_for_result">Hay chon du %1$d anh de xuat ket qua</string> <string name="select_one_photo_for_edit">Vui long chon 1 anh de chinh sua</string> <string name="batch_edit_start">Dang chinh sua %1$d anh da chon</string> <string name="batch_edit_completed">Da hoan thanh chinh sua anh da chon</string> <string name="selected_strip_title">Selected photos</string> <string name="clear_selection">Clear</string> <string name="selection_status_initial">Selected: 0/0</string> <string name="selection_status_none">Selected: 0/%1$d</string> <string name="selection_status_selected">Selected: %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="capture_status_ready">Ready to capture</string> <string name="capture_status_starting">Starting capture sequence (%1$d photos)</string> <string name="capture_status_next">Prepare for photo %1$d/%2$d</string> <string name="capture_status_countdown">Photo %1$d/%2$d in %3$ds</string> <string name="capture_status_captured">Captured %1$d/%2$d photos</string> <string name="capture_status_done">Done! %1$d photos captured</string> <string name="capture_status_error">Capture interrupted. Please try again.</string> </resources>
